history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell ahead at row 02 column C is lava (`L`), so I cannot move forward safely. I need to change direction to find a path around the lava to reach the goal at row 08 column H. Turning downwards seems best to explore the safe empty cells below. To face down from right, I should turn right (clockwise).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 03 column B is empty (`.`), so it is safe to move forward. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal by going down towards row 08.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 04 column B is empty (`.`), so I can safely move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 05 column B is empty (`.`), so it is safe to move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

I am at row 05 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 06 column B is empty (`.`), so I can safely move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 07 column B is empty (`.`), so I can safely move forward to progress toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 07 column B facing down (`v`). The cell ahead at row 08 column B is empty (`.`), so I can safely move forward.
However, the goal is at row 08 column H. After moving forward, I will need to turn right to head towards the goal on the right side.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 08 column B facing down (`v`). The cell below (row 09 column B) is a wall `#`, so moving forward is not possible.

The goal is at row 08 column H, which is to my right. I need to turn right to face right (`>`), then move forward to get closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 08 column B facing left (`<`). The goal is at column H, which is to the right. I am facing the opposite direction. 

To move towards the goal, I need to turn around. Since I am facing left and goal is to the right, I will turn left twice to face right (`>`).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am now facing downwards (`v`) at row 08 column B. The goal is at row 08 column H, which means I need to face right (`>`). To turn from facing down to facing right, I will turn left (counter-clockwise).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing right (`>`) at row 08 column B. The goal is at row 08 column H, so I should move forward along the row towards the goal. The cells in front are '.', which are safe to move onto.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column C facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The next cell in front at row 08 column D is floor ('.'), so it is safe to move forward toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column D facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The next cell in front at row 08 column E is a floor ('.') which is safe to move to. I will proceed forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column E facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The next cell in front at row 08 column F is floor ('.'), safe to move forward. I will move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column F facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The next cell in front at row 08 column G is floor ('.'), safe to move forward. I will move forward towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>

</action>

<thought>
I am at row 08 column G facing right (`>`). The goal is at row 08 column H. The next cell in front at row 08 column H is the goal (`G`). I will move forward to reach the goal.

<action>

</action>
